SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules

Class RuleContext

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules.RuleContext
public class RuleContext extends Object
Builds a property namespace from TLS metadata and provides property resolution for the expression evaluator.

Exposes: session.*, cert.*, revocation.*, protocols (Set), ciphers (List of maps).

    • getWarnings

      public static RuleContext from(IEngine engine) throws DeepVioletException

      Throws:
      DeepVioletException

    • toSerializableMap

      public Map<String,Object> toSerializableMap()
      Export this context as a serializable map (for JSON persistence). Converts Set values to List for clean JSON round-tripping.
